input_text: The picture was painted by Leo. Winona is a cat. Elephants have trunks or tails. A surgeon, Dr. Smith, entered the room. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. "Riga is outside America. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 10 percent. John has no trunk. The letter was written in June. Mary's uncle arrived. The stone was red. Mike is cool. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. John has a tail?
